---
title: "Authors"
---

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

data = await FileAttachment("_data/publications.json").json()
pubs = data.publications

// Build a summary table: one row per author
authorMap = {
  const m = new Map()
  for (const pub of pubs) {
    const authors = pub.authors || []
    const orcids  = pub.orcids  || []
    authors.forEach((name, i) => {
      if (!m.has(name)) {
        m.set(name, { name, orcid: orcids[i] || "", count: 0, per_count: 0 })
      }
      m.get(name).count++
      if (pub.is_per) m.get(name).per_count++
    })
  }
  return Array.from(m.values()).sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count)
}

md`**${authorMap.length} authors** contributing **${pubs.length} publications** in total.`

Inputs.table(authorMap, {
  columns: ["name", "orcid", "count", "per_count"],
  header: {
    name:      "Name",
    orcid:     "ORCID",
    count:     "Total publications",
    per_count: "PER publications"
  },
  format: {
    orcid: id => id
      ? htl.html`<a href="https://orcid.org/${id}" target="_blank">${id}</a>`
      : ""
  }
})
```
